auditBasis: The accepted refinement reorders exact source frames in the running state and applies one deterministic chroma-edge despill. It does not draw, interpolate, resample, or replace Miaomiao's character art.

standardRows.postDespillRgbChangeReason: Expected deterministic edge-color cleanup from the single final despill pass; alpha geometry remains exact.

lookRows.decision: The original approved direction cells were preserved after both generated repair attempts failed the semantic or identity gate.
lookRows.note: Every look-cell alpha mask is exact after its deterministic 0-or-1-pixel horizontal registration; there is no scale or silhouette change.

identityFeaturesPreserved: asymmetric gray, orange, and white calico markings
Maine Coon proportions and facial identity
